Dawn of the Dead (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $58,990,765Details
International Box Office $44,462,110
Worldwide Box Office $103,452,875
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$26,722,575 (45.3% of total gross)
Legs:2.21 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:57.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$28,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,745 opening theaters/2,748 max. theaters, 4.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $113,611,843

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 19th, 2004 (Wide) by Universal
International Releases: June 3rd, 2004 (Wide) (New Zealand)
June 10th, 2004 (Wide) (Australia)
October 31st, 2024 (Limited) (New Zealand)
Video Release: October 26th, 2004 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for pervasive strong horror violence and gore, language and sexuality.
Running Time: 100 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Remake
Plot point: Zombies
Subgenre: Action Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
